post.summary: Query for resources with limited result

parameters.description: The offset from where the results should be returned
parameters.name: QueryOffset

NextOffset.description: The next offset where more results are available for this query. If missing, it means that no more results are available for further queries

email.description: Public email address of the publisher

publisherType.description: Catagorize publisher whether it is public or private.

publisherCategory.description: The publisher's metadata delivery type. Either manual or external.

frequency.description: Estimated number of publications per year

website.description: URL of the publisher's public website

metadataDelivery.description: The publisher's metadata delivery type. Either manual or external.

activity.description: Whether the publisher is active or not.

yearInactivated.description: The year the publisher became inactive. Can only be present when active is false.
